🍒ANSWERING NGL'S QUESTION!! :3

1— HI KAELL! just want to ask, how long have you been into aespa? glad to meet one of the fanboys here lol

•Hello!! I know aespa since SM was going to debut a group of 4 members😭😭 After that, and also after the girls' debut, I ended up falling in love with each one of them. I'm aespa utted! I especially love winter, and once I had the opportunity to get her autograph😭😭😭

2—Hi, I wanna ask if u do non-oc bots like ones from an actual show?

•Yes, yes, maybe I will!

3—Which bot did you like the least?

•I don't really like Alessi's bot💀 despite it being the easiest and most well-known bot I've ever made on this platform. I didn't like the development, maybe in his ALT I'll improve this a little.

4—Are you a virgin?:3 (I'M SORRY FOR THAT QUESTION😭😭😭🥺🥺🥺)

•HSUHEWINSWIIS this question is actually a bit suspicious, but I don't mind answering it. And no, I'm not a virgin:3 I obviously do things with my beloved boyfriend

5—Where did you get the nickname “Kael”?

•Well, I don't really know how to explain it, but Mikael is a very beautiful name in my opinion, so I decided that this would be the username;3
